title: Fix Home tuning startup attribute crash
summary: Fixed startup crash caused by missing Home tuning fields (including thumbs_pump_interval_ms on HomeLayoutTuning) and added a regression test that checks self.T.home references against HomeLayoutTuning fields.
notes: Narrow startup crash fix only. No broad Home redesign, repository/scanner changes, or MPV backend changes were made. venv Python launch was blocked in this environment.
